privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for visual_studio_2022_env enable_xml_documentation task by discovering that the task is critically defective. The required setup scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the underlying C# project files (NumericalUtilities.sln) are completely missing from the environment, which permanently breaks the verifier because it attempts to read a non-existent task_result.json output file. The expected XML path, classes count (4), methods count (16), and total parameters count (19) match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt description and the hardcoded scoring calculations in verifier.py.
